title: × cephalepipactis speciosa
side_effects: × cephalepipactis speciosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as rapid heartbeat, dizziness, and nausea due to its high levels of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as increased risk of seizures in individuals with pre-existing conditions. Improper dosing can also cause respiratory failure, especially in people with compromised lung function. Additionally, excessive consumption may interact with other medications, exacerbating conditions such as high blood pressure and diabetes.
